name: update_order
description: Update an existing order's status, customer note, billing/shipping addresses, or metadata. Commonly used to transition orders through fulfillment stages (processing, completed, on-hold) or add tracking information.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the order to update.

parameters.name: customer_note
parameters.description: A note to add to the order visible to the customer.
parameters.example: Your order has been shipped via UPS.

parameters.name: billing
parameters.description: Updated billing address fields (first_name, last_name, address_1, city, state, postcode, country, email, phone).

parameters.name: shipping
parameters.description: Updated shipping address fields (first_name, last_name, address_1, city, state, postcode, country).

parameters.name: meta_data
parameters.description: Array of meta data objects with 'key' and 'value' to add custom metadata.

body.customer_note: Your order has been shipped via UPS.
Your order has been shipped via UPS.
